pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version remains at 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the maven-compiler-plugin version to 3.14.1 to ensure compatibility with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not support compiling code for JDK 21 targets.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.annotation-api dependency to provide annotation classes removed from JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Classes like @Generated or @Nullable from javax.annotation are no longer in the JDK module path in JDK 21, causing compilation errors if used.
